title: Nvidia's changing its strategic approach to AI, going all in on inferencing and agents
summary: Nvidia is evolving to focus on inferencing and AI agents.

title: Treasury yields surge, Super Micro stock plunges on chip accusations
summary: Yahoo Finance's John Hyland tracks Thursday's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. US stocks (^DJI, ^GSPC, ^IXIC) are falling for a third straight session as investors stayed in risk-off mode amid ongoing geopolitical tensions and uncertainty around the global energy outlook. In the bond market (^TYX, ^TNX, ^FVX), short-term yields rose as traders reassessed rate expectations, shifting from anticipated cuts to potential hikes. Super Micro Computer (SMCI) shares plunged after US authorities charged a co-founder with illegally diverting Nvidia-powered (NVDA) servers to China, though the company was not named in the case.

title: Super Micro co-founder's smuggling arrest, Planet Labs stock soars
summary: Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman takes a look at some of Friday morning's trending tickers and stories. FedEx (FDX) earnings beat Wall Street's estimates on the top and bottom lines. The company also lifted its full-year guidance. The co-founder of Super Micro Computer (SMCI), Yih-Shyan "Wally" Liaw, was arrested for allegedly smuggling Nvidia (NVDA)-powered servers to China. Planet Labs (PL) stock is skyrocketing after the company beat fourth quarter revenue expectations.

title: Jensen Huang Just Delivered Incredible News for Nvidia Investors
Dow Jones Jumps Late After Sell-Off As Trump Mulls 'Winding Down' Iran War
summary: The major indexes broke long-term support as oil prices and bond yields soar. President Trump said late Friday he's mulling "winding down" the Iran war hours after saying that was not "acceptable."
